sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5784" key="a)mfidh/tioi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφιδήτιοι</orth>, prob. <sense id="n5784.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀμφιδέαι</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0161.tlg001:130" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Democr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">130</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
